test case id: tc-access-003 title: verify the commission and offer creation process module: access source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to the home page. test data: valid commission and offer details. test steps: 1. navigate to the home page. 2. start the commission creation process. 3. provide valid commission details. 4. proceed to the decision point "creazione corretta?". 5. confirm the commission creation was successful. 6. proceed to the offer creation process. 7. provide valid offer details. 8. confirm the offer creation was successful. 9. proceed to the home page. expected result: the commission and offer should be successfully created and the user should be redirected to the home page.

test case id: tc-access-010 title: verify the edge case where no commission or offer creation is required module: access source pages: 2 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: test steps: 1. navigate to the home page. 2. start the commission creation process. 3. confirm no commission creation is required. 4. proceed to the offer creation process. 5. confirm no offer creation is required. 6. stay on the home page. expected result: the user should stay on the home page and be informed that no commission or offer creation is required.

test case id: tc-access-004 title: verify the commission and offer creation process with invalid data module: access source pages: 2 preconditions: user is logged in and has access to the home page. test data: invalid commission and offer details (empty fields, invalid formats). test steps: 1. navigate to the home page. 2. start the commission creation process. 3. provide invalid commission details. 4. proceed to the decision point "creazione corretta?". 5. confirm the commission creation failed. 6. proceed to the offer creation process. 7. provide invalid offer details. 8. confirm the offer creation failed. 9. stay on the home page. expected result: the commission and offer creation should fail, and the user should remain on the home page.
